# GitHub Labels for Nebulara
# Copy to repository settings

bug: Bug fix - Something isn't working correctly
documentation: Documentation - Improvements or additions to docs
enhancement: Enhancement - New feature or request
good first issue: Good first issue - Good for newcomers
help wanted: Help wanted - Extra attention needed
in progress: In progress - Work is actively being done
question: Question - Further information requested
wontfix: Won't fix - This will not be worked on

compiler: Compiler - Issues with .nbs compilation
runtime: Runtime - VM and execution issues  
ffi: FFI - Foreign function interface
vulkan: Vulkan - GPU compute support
grammar: Grammar - Language syntax and parsing
bootstrap: Bootstrap - Self-hosting infrastructure
